title: Doff Ultra Weedkiller – 1L Ready to Use Glyphosate-Free Spray for Garden Protection – Kills Rooted Weeds from Pathways to Driveways - Long Lasting Weed Control – Strong Weed Killer
features: EFFECTIVE ADVANCED WEED KILLER – Tackle stubborn annual and broad-leaved weeds with Doff Ultra Weedkiller. Its systemic action ensures thorough treatment and dependable long-lasting protection. This selective weedkiller is ideal for patios and driveways, targeting weeds without harming the grass

READY-TO-USE CONVENIENCE – Save time with this pre-mixed weedkiller formula that requires no dilution, making application quick and hassle-free. Its adjustable nozzle ensures precise application. Simply apply directly from the bottle for fast and easy weed control where needed

ELIMINATE & PREVENT – The glyphosate-free weedkiller solution eliminates weeds such as docks, dandelions and more, destroying them at the roots. Spray when weeds are actively growing, directly onto the leaf area to absorb the spray

VERSATILE & RELIABLE – Designed to combat tough weeds like nettles and thistles, it’s perfect for any garden space needing a fresh, weed-free finish. Available in 1L spray bottle, this root killer treats weeds in areas up to 50m²

WEEDED IN EXCELLENCE – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for weed control. Our quality-crafted solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering safe, effective weed management, helping your plants thrive while keeping unwanted growth at bay
